#ad | Paid partnership with @ezeemobile 🤝

So I've teamed up with the legends at @ezeemobile to bring you EZEE Hacks, a series where I share the quick fixes that make a real difference around your home. Starting with this one: the sticking door. Drives everyone mad. Takes 5 minutes to fix. 🚪
Right now EZEE Mobile is giving you 30% off your first 3 recharges across all their 5G prepaid mobile plans — and use my code DAN5 at checkout for an extra $5 off your first recharge on top of that.*

Big thanks to them for making this series happen.

DAN5: one-time $5 off the first recharge of a new EZEE Mobile prepaid 5G mobile plan when the code is entered at checkout on ezeemobile.com.au or the EZEE Mobile App. Valid 22/05/2026 – 01/09/2026. Available to new customers, or existing customers activating a new additional service. One use per service. Offers stack — 30% applied first off RRP, then $5 off the resulting amount. EZEE Mobile uses parts of the Telstra Wholesale Network. Full T&Cs and Critical Information Summary at ezeemobile.com.au
